ip_outcome_note: Scryfall flavor_text is explicitly attributed to Liliana Vess, and the card carries a planeswalker watermark. The Dominaria set's story spotlight cards chronicle Liliana's arc eliminating her fourth and final demon Belzenlok; Settle the Score is card no. 103, one of four story spotlight cards in the set. Visual match: dark-robed figure with long dark hair directing necromantic energy exactly matches Liliana Vess's canonical visual identity. IP verified.

trivia_bullets.text: Settle the Score is one of four story spotlight cards in Dominaria (released April 2018), depicting Liliana Vess defeating Belzenlok — her fourth and final demonic creditor — aboard the Cabal Stronghold in Urborg. Scryfall marks it `story_spotlight: true` and carries a planeswalker watermark. [Scryfall]

Flavor text: "You bound me with a contract only your death could end—and you thought me the fool?" —Liliana Vess [Scryfall]. The quoted line confirms the depicted figure is Liliana addressing the dying Belzenlok, invoking the demonic contract that bound her.

Liliana's victory over Belzenlok did not free her: the contract defaulted to Nicol Bolas, who had brokered the original deal. When the Gatewatch departed Dominaria, Bolas revealed himself as Liliana's new owner — trading one demon master for an elder dragon. [Hipsters of the Coast: 'Liliana's Demons', 2018]
sources: Hipsters of the Coast: 'Liliana's Demons', June 2018

trivia_bullets.text: Art by Yongjae Choi. The card has not been reprinted in any other set as of 2026 — it remains a Dominaria-exclusive. [Scryfall prints search]

Oracle text: exile target creature, then put two loyalty counters on a planeswalker you control. The loyalty-counter mode creates a hard dependency on controlling a planeswalker — by design, the card functions as Liliana's own spell, fueling herself after landing the killing blow on Belzenlok. EDHREC rank 12,961 indicates modest Commander adoption. [Scryfall]
